mainEntity.name: My Injury Got Worse, Now What?

acceptedAnswer.text: If your work injury has worsened, you may be entitled to additional benefits. It is crucial to notify your employer and seek medical attention as soon as possible. Consulting with a workers' compensation attorney can help you understand your rights and navigate the process of seeking further compensation.
